sizing_rule.note: Standardize all position calculations on 1 unit basis. Unit definition is trader-dependent: 1 contract (futures/options), fixed share quantity (stocks), or fixed lot size (forex/cash). This is a prerequisite for HPR calculation and forms the foundation for all subsequent sizing decisions.

source_rule_text: All trades must be calculated and executed on a standardized 1 unit basis, with the trader defining what constitutes 1 unit based on instrument type.
